keyPoints: SMS Telephony uses cellular networks to send and receive SMS messages.
Location Based Services (LBS) use GPS and cellular networks to provide location information.
SMS can be used to send and receive location information to and from a mobile device.
LBS can be used to provide location information to emergency services in the event of an accident.
SMS and LBS can be used together to provide a more accurate location of a mobile device.
Android devices are commonly used for SMS and LBS applications.
